# VentureOS

> The AI-native CRM for venture capital. VentureOS helps early-stage
> funds source founders before they raise, generate first-pass investment memos in
> their own format, track relationships and email, and keep their pipeline moving —
> built and used every day inside an active fund, not a lab.

## What it does
- AI deal sourcing from leading signals (GitHub, Product Hunt, ecosystem feeds) before a round is announced.
- AI investment memos: turns a pitch deck + materials into a structured first-pass memo (market sizing, team, risks, comparables) in the fund's format.
- Pipeline management with stale-deal nudges.
- Email and relationship tracking via inbox integration.
- Automatic data enrichment, deduplication, and source attribution.

## Positioning
- Built by active investors, for investors. Augments human judgment (taste, trust, conviction) rather than replacing it.
- Prioritizes leading indicators over lagging ones (closed rounds/acquisitions).
